positive: A sophisticated, stylized celestial fox meditating on a crescent moon. The fox should have glowing, iridescent white and sapphire fur, rendered with clean, sharp lines and a silhouette aesthetic. It is surrounded by blooming cosmic flora, including bioluminescent mushrooms and trailing stardust vines. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, featuring strong negative space and highly contrasting midnight blues, electric violets, and brilliant silver accents. High contrast, minimalist design, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric, vector graphic quality, engraved line art style, fantasy poster, deep bokeh background.
